name: tinypng-cli
description: Batch-compress TinyPNG-supported images from Codex workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Compress AVIF, WebP, PNG, and JPEG images with TinyPNG.
interface.longDescription: TinyPNG CLI helps Codex compress image folders while respecting include/exclude filters and project .gitignore files.
defaultPrompt: Compress images in this project with tinypng-cli without overwriting originals.
